Simulate simple capture history

Source: R/simulate_ch.R
sim_simple_s4t_ch.Rd

Simulates a small capture history with 3 sites, where there can be holdovers between the first 1st and 2nd sites.

Usage

sim_simple_s4t_ch(N = 500, max_obs_year = 2, prop_missing_age = 0.5)

Arguments

N

An integer of the number of individuals

max_obs_year

an integer of the number of total time intervals

prop_missing_age

a numeric value between 0 and 1 of the proportion of individuals that do not have known ages. Default is 0.50.

Value

a list containing capture history data.frame, list containing the parameters.

On this page
